description: Single clear factual statement should be extracted
input: The Earth is approximately 4.5 billion years old.
expected_claims: The Earth is approximately 4.5 billion years old.

description: Pure opinion should result in no claims extracted
input: Pizza is the best food in the world.

description: Should extract fact but reject opinion from same text
input: The Earth orbits the Sun at about 67,000 mph. Summer is definitely the best season of the year.
expected_claims: The Earth orbits the Sun at about 67,000 mph.

description: Multiple factual claims should all be extracted
input: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level. The speed of light is approximately 299,792 kilometers per second.
expected_claims: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
The speed of light is approximately 299,792 kilometers per second.

description: Health-related claims should be extracted for verification
input: Vitamin C supplements can prevent the common cold.
expected_claims: Vitamin C supplements can prevent the common cold.

description: Statistical claims with numbers should be preserved accurately
input: Approximately 70% of the Earth's surface is covered by water.
expected_claims: Approximately 70% of the Earth's surface is covered by water.

description: Historical facts with dates should be extracted
input: World War II ended in 1945 with the surrender of Japan.
expected_claims: World War II ended in 1945 with the surrender of Japan.

input: Smoking cigarettes significantly increases the risk of lung cancer.
expected_claims: Smoking cigarettes significantly increases the risk of lung cancer.

description: Disputed claims should still be extracted (they're verifiable, just wrong)
input: The Great Wall of China is visible from space with the naked eye.
expected_claims: The Great Wall of China is visible from space with the naked eye.

description: Speculative predictions without factual basis should not be extracted
input: I think it will probably rain tomorrow afternoon.

description: Should extract multiple facts from a paragraph while ignoring opinions
input: The Amazon rainforest produces about 20% of the world's oxygen. It spans across 9 countries in South America. Many people believe it's the most beautiful place on Earth, though that's subjective.
expected_claims: The Amazon rainforest produces about 20% of the world's oxygen.
The Amazon rainforest spans across 9 countries in South America.

description: Factual claims within quotes should be extracted
input: Scientists say that "the universe is approximately 13.8 billion years old."
expected_claims: The universe is approximately 13.8 billion years old.
